name: MockK
description: Mocking library for Kotlin with first-class support for coroutines, object/static mocks and DSL designed around Kotlin idioms.

seo.title: MockK — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: MockK: Mocking library for Kotlin with first-class support for coroutines, object/static mocks and DSL designed around Kotlin idioms.

when_to_use: Kotlin-idiomatic mocking with coroutine test support
Object and companion object mocking for Kotlin code
Verify DSL with natural Kotlin syntax for call assertions
Mock suspend functions in Kotlin coroutine test suites

pros: Designed around Kotlin idioms from day one
First-class coroutine and suspend function mocking
Handles object and top-level function mocks
cons: Slower than Mockito on very large suites
Less Stack Overflow coverage than Mockito
Mocking everything hides Kotlin design smells
review.verdict: Clearly the right mocking library for Kotlin, worth the migration from Mockito for Kotlin-heavy code.
review.best_for: Kotlin teams testing coroutines, sealed classes and objects
review.not_for: Mixed Java/Kotlin codebases where Mockito is already well embedded
